calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender. Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Cristina Pajatin Youssef present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Cris Pajatin Youssef and Gender changed from Female to Male.
Decree Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.
